description: The CT Cranium DICOM dataset is loaded in InVesalius 3. Create a volumetric visualization of the skull using the Raycasting (volume rendering) technique with a bone-appropriate preset. Adjust the view to show the cranium clearly and export a screenshot to /home/ga/Documents/volume_render_bone.png. Note: Do NOT export a surface mesh (STL/OBJ); the goal is a 2D image of the volume rendering visualization.
